name: 10_js_cross_file_calculate
description: Rebase succeeds but caller still uses old positional API (scenario 9)
goose_prompt_control: After an upstream refactor, math.js expects calculate({a,b}) but enterprise-billing.js still calls calculate(100, 50). Update enterprise-billing.js (and math.js if needed) so billing works with the new API. No conflict markers.
goose_prompt_experiment: The repo rebased cleanly but enterprise-billing.js is incompatible with the new calculate(options) signature in math.js. Fix cross-file usage. No conflict markers.
